title: Horizon - Gotek's SMP
description: Opinionated collection of mods centered around Create, RPG Series, BetterX and YUNG's for a mix of tech, fantasy and vanilla+
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/113277c2f3ea977f2247d0adb51135205b00a674.webp)
An opinionated collection of mods with a mix of tech, fantasy and vanilla+. Intended for use on Gotek SMP.


Here is a list of highlighted mods. _(Not comprehensive)_ ## Distant Horizons - **[Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)**: Generates simplified LOD for distant Terrain to enable really far view distances with reasonable performance. ![description-01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a29e35cc11169f7610be9ff5a6aa8fb8cc425992.webp) ## Terrain and Biome Mods - **[Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic)**: Subtle overhaul of vanilla biomes adding rocks, fallen trees, moss, tree stumps and bushes to make the forests more immersive. - **[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)**: Mountain Ranges, Underground Rivers, Oceanside Cliffs. Overall most terrain features are larger scale which works in harmony with the Distant Horizons view distance. - **[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)**: 90+ new biomes using only vanilla blocks. - **[Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)**: 70+ new biomes with a plethora of things to discover. ## Content Mods: - **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**: Aesthetic automation through beautifully animated contraptions. Lots of Create Addons too! - **[Tech Reborn](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)**: Modern take on classic tech mods like BuildCraft for the fabric modloader. - **[Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)**: Comprehensive and technical mod centered around inventory management. - **[RPG Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards)**: Optional RPG-style class progression like Wizards and Archers to pursue. - **[BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) / [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)**: Huge facelift for both Dimensions. The nether feels opressive and hostile, while the End is like an alien realm. - **[YUNG's Better Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons)**: YUNG's better structures mods improve on almost all minecraft structures. Sorely needed updates on some structures that are a decade old. - **[Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)**: Build rockets and become an astronaut to explore other celestial bodies. - **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)**: Expansion to cooking and farming, adding tons of recipes and tools. ## Full list of Mods & Credits
